name: parity-driven-development
description: PDD — Parity-Driven Development. Framework para refactor de legados com paridade comportamental rastreável.

plugins.name: pdd
plugins.description: PDD (Parity-Driven Development) — framework para refactor/rewrite/port de sistemas legados. Provê /audit-bootstrap, /audit-new, /audit-investigate, /audit-resolve, /audit-compare, /audit-pr, /audit-qa e /audit-status, mais a CLI `pdd` de painel.
